description: Oil, gas, nuclear, renewable power generation, the grid, and energy markets. Energy-facility accidents and blackout emergencies go to Disasters; climate policy goes to Climate.

Oil pipeline and refinery throughput changes affect regional fuel supply and prices

Grid-scale battery storage project stabilizes renewable electricity supply
Government subsidies and tax credits accelerate the clean energy transition
Coal power plant retires as a utility shifts generation toward renewables
Wholesale electricity prices soar squeezing households and heavy industry
Nuclear fusion energy experiment achieves a net energy gain milestone toward power generation

Hydropower dam generates electricity for millions of homes

Geothermal and tidal renewable projects diversify the energy generation mix
Rooftop solar and home battery systems reshape residential electricity use
